title: Lucid Group Q1 2026 Financial Results Summary
text: Lucid Group Q1 2026 Financial Results. Key Financial Metrics. Revenue & Production: Q1 2026 revenue: $282.5 million (up 20% year-over-year). Vehicles produced: 5,500 (up 149% from Q1 2025). Vehicles delivered: 3,093. Liquidity Position: Quarter-end liquidity: ~$3.2 billion. Pro forma liquidity (including April capital raise): ~$4.7 billion. Capital Raise Details. Lucid secured approximately $1.05 billion in total funding: $550 million in convertible preferred stock from PIF affiliate, $300 million from registered common stock offering, $200 million equity investment from Uber bringing Uber's total investment to $500 million. Operational Highlights. Management & Partnerships: Silvio Napoli announced as next CEO. Expanded Uber robotaxi partnership to at least 35,000 vehicles. Lucid Gravity awarded 2026 World Luxury Car of the Year. Production Challenges: A seat supplier issue identified that significantly affected Lucid Gravity deliveries in February.
